title: convolvulus tricolor
intro: Convolvulus tricolor, also known as the dwarf morning glory, is a flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Convolvulus tricolor can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its potential health benefits.
